description_long: This shotgun features a sleek, elongated barrel with a matte black finish and subtle ribbing along the top. The receiver area is highlighted with metallic gold accents and a small emblem, adding a touch of detail to the otherwise utilitarian design. The stock is ergonomically shaped, combining a dark wood texture with a black and red rubberized butt pad for comfort and recoil absorption. The trigger guard is rounded and moderately sized, providing ample space for finger placement. The fore-end appears to be integrated with the main body, and there is no visible pump or lever mechanism. Overall, the shotgun has a modern, streamlined appearance suitable for urban environments.
description: A modern, streamlined shotgun with a black barrel, gold-accented receiver, and ergonomic wood-textured stock with a rubberized butt pad.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shotgun, highlighting the black barrel, gold receiver, and detailed stock.
description_view_1: Front-on view emphasizing the narrow barrel profile and the alignment of the sights.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the features of view 0 with clear visibility of the stock and receiver details.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the stock's ergonomic shape and the alignment of the barrel.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, long with subtle ribbing along the top
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, moderately sized, with a smooth contour and no visible finger grooves
